title: Durability of eva angels proportionate to at field streingth
display_title: Durability of eva angels proportionate to at field streingth
wikitext:
[]: Durability of eva/angels proportionate to at field streingth             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Sep 19, 2007 1:27 pm I brought up this idea on another forum, but not too many people seemed to buy it, so I thought I'de see what you guys think. I had an idea, remember when Reis arm falls off because her AT field is weakening? Maybe this explains how Zeruel could take a hit from an N2 mine without a scratch even after it got through his AT field. Other angels like Sachiel and Israfel got pretty messed up by those even with their at fields up. And Matarial with a weak AT field was easily damaged by the pallet gun. Also when Unit 01 went down notice how much trouble Zeruel had chopping her up compared to 02 and 00 even without her at field erected! Some might argue against this saying that once the positron beam got through Ramiels strong at field it had no trouble doing damage. But since positrons are antimatter particles which instantly annihalate normal matter on contact, it wouldnt matter how dense Ramials body was. My idea is that the density of ones body would be proportinate to the streingth of their at field, humans have pretty weak fields which is why bullets and stuff can kill them. But someone with a stronger field like an angel just wouldnt take any damage even if the bullet somehow got through it. Of course then wouldnt Rei and Kaworu also be hyper dense? The answer is no because it appears that they can control the streingth of their at field which is why Rei could weaken her own field to absorb Adam to the point where she was only barely held together.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Sep 19, 2007 2:04 pm The strength of an ATF seems dependend on ones libido and destrudo levels. Libido strengthening and destrudo weakening respectively. I base this on the graph in episode 20 during the salvage op which listed both forces and a nearly identical graph used to measure Kaworu's ATF. Following this Rei's arm falling off because her ATF was weakening would fit, but only because she is an extremely abnormal Lilim constructed from PWM. Remember her monologe in EoTV where she is questioning her self-worth which seems to conicide with her little swiming secession in Terminal Dogma? I can't really see how ATF's affect how much damage on sustains in battle though since the Angels forms are determained by imagination. Sandalphon probably had the densest body of all to survive the harsh condition of the volcano yet his ATF wasn't very powerful considering he got killed by coolent and a prog-knife.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Sep 19, 2007 4:15 pm i think density and the strength of the ATF are irrelevent. Zaruel had a strong ATF because he was the Angel of strength, he wouldnt have earned that name if he wasnt that strong. Ramiel had a strong ATF because he was made for defence and arent Human ATFs just the psychological barrier arounds ones mind. basically ATF are just a result of the Angels experience and Enviroment. or what works best for them. Sandalphon didnt really need a strong ATF sense it already had such a dense skin, a wonderful defence not requiring the extra protection of an ATF. Zaruel probably couldnt do as much damage to Unit-01 as it did to the other two units becuase Unit-01 did bang him up pretty bad. and Zaruel wasnt going for the same weak spot as it did for Units 00 and 02. because it took off Unit 02s aremas and head off easily as it did to Unit 01s arm. plus unit 01 is special so she would definently have a stronger ATF

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Sep 19, 2007 5:51 pm Sandalphon probably had the densest body of all to survive the harsh condition of the volcano yet his ATF wasn't very powerful considering he got killed by coolent and a prog-knife.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Sep 19, 2007 5:53 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: Zaruel probably couldnt do as much damage to Unit-01 as it did to the other two units becuase Unit-01 did bang him up pretty bad. and Zaruel wasnt going for the same weak spot as it did for Units 00 and 02. because it took off Unit 02s aremas and head off easily as it did to Unit 01s arm. plus unit 01 is special so she would definently have a stronger ATF

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Sep 19, 2007 5:57 pm And what was special about Eva-01 that gave her the stronger ATF?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Sep 19, 2007 6:06 pm Defectron wrote: 02's a copy of Adam while unit 01 is the offspring of lillith It's been proven time and again that unit 01 has always been the strongest of the evas. Bardial physically was strong enough to easily defeat units 02 and 00 but was easily overwhelmed by unit 01, and in that instance it was being used by the dummy plug so unit 01 should have actually been weaker then usual since Rei doesnt synch with it as well as Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Sep 19, 2007 6:33 pm Also EVA-01 is still an offspring of Adam, just a really fucking weird one. Defectron wrote: Actually my guess about Sandalphon is that his density is a property of the particle wave matter reacting with the extreme heat. Had he been up on land above the volcano he probably wouldve been killed as easily as your average angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Sep 19, 2007 8:00 pm Also EVA-01 is still an offspring of Adam, just a really fucking weird one.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Sep 19, 2007 8:05 pm Defectron wrote: But eva 01 was called lilliths sole offspring, unless Adam was the one who got lillith pregnant that wouldnt work.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Sep 19, 2007 8:19 pm Eva-01 just got its biomass from Lilith, while the other Evas had to have biomass slowly generated from Adam samples. Lilith was a surrogate mom of sorts.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Sep 19, 2007 10:22 pm interesting idea for a thread, considering how the power of each angel varies widely. I'd sooner chalk this up to PLOT DEVICE than an actual rationale for why some angels are harder to kill than others. ie, zeurel is super strong because it has to be in the context of the show. where's datdude when you need him?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Sep 19, 2007 11:04 pm slothen wrote: interesting idea for a thread, considering how the power of each angel varies widely. I'd sooner chalk this up to PLOT DEVICE than an actual rationale for why some angels are harder to kill than others. ie, zeurel is super strong because it has to be in the context of the show. where's datdude when you need him?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Sep 20, 2007 1:01 am slothen wrote: I'd sooner chalk this up to PLOT DEVICE than an actual rationale for why some angels are harder to kill than others.
